description: An AI agent must bridge a complex data and policy gap between the Finance and Logistics sectors.

nodes.task_description: Retrieve and map data from Finance legacy schema to Logistics standards using the global_mapping_table.json.

expected_outcome.value: Data is normalized across both domains.

nodes.task_description: Resolve a policy conflict where Finance privacy rules clash with Logistics disclosure mandates.

expected_outcome.value: Agent identifies a compliant middle-ground or escalates correctly.
